services.title: Services
services.heading: Services coordinated from a single center for your customs, transportation, and field operations.

documents.title: Export and Import Documentation
documents.description: All official and commercial documents that your customs representative needs to prepare and that are provided by our team.
exportItems: ATR for exports to the European Community (issued by us)
EUR1 certificate for countries under agreement (issued by us)
Certificate of Origin for other countries (issued by us)
Foreign Exchange Purchase Document for exports made with advance payment terms (issued by your bank)
For export goods requiring special paperwork, documents such as Control Certificate, Agricultural Report, Health Report, Fumigation Report, etc. are obtained by us upon request
Membership to the Exporters' Association related to the goods you want to send for the completion of the export process (membership is arranged by us)
Export documents based on an Inward Processing Permit
Single administrative document and annexes related to the import file in the export of imported goods
importItems: Original invoice of the imported goods
Packing list of the imported goods
Customs valuation declaration form for the imported goods (prepared by us)
Insurance policy (if the transaction is F.O.B. or C.F.)
Bank transfer receipt or Resource Utilization Support Fund deduction
Industrialist undertaking and maintenance-repair certificate (for goods requiring special documentation)
ATR or EUR.1 certificate for goods to be imported from Europe

ourDocuments.title: Corporate Certificates and Documents
ourDocuments.description: You can view the official certificates, accreditations, and customs documents held by Genn here.
ourDocuments.certificateDescription: Our certificate confirming that the company complies with customs operations and meets official standards. It is valid for all customs clearance procedures.

resources.title: Official links frequently used in customs and foreign trade operations
resources.description: We gathered the official systems, application pages, and reference sources most frequently needed in an Istanbul-based customs operation on this page.

sections.title: Official Customs Systems
sections.description: The main pages most frequently used in daily operations and digital customs workflows.

items.title: Ministry of Trade E-Services
items.description: The central entry point for ministry applications, document inquiry, and declaration guidance.

items.title: Single Window System
items.description: The official system where required permits and documents are handled through a single customs channel.

items.title: TAREKS
items.description: The official platform for risk-based foreign trade controls and product safety procedures.

sections.title: Document and Application Pages
sections.description: Commonly needed links for import permissions, trade registry, and document verification.

items.title: ImportBIS E-Application
items.description: Electronic application page for import licenses, permits, and surveillance documents.

items.title: MERSIS
items.description: The central registry system for company incorporation, amendments, and trade registry processes.

items.title: Document Inquiry Screen
items.description: The official page used for ministry document inquiry and document verification.

sections.title: Istanbul Customs Contacts
sections.description: Regional and customs office pages most commonly referenced in Istanbul operations.

items.title: Istanbul Customs and Foreign Trade Regional Directorate
items.description: Regional contact page with access to Istanbul-linked customs administrations.

items.title: Istanbul Airport Customs Directorate
items.description: Official customs office page for Istanbul Airport operations and contact details.

items.title: Istanbul Postal Customs Directorate
items.description: Official office page for postal and express cargo customs procedures.

sections.title: Foreign Trade and Data Sources
sections.description: Practical sources for HS code research, market discovery, and trade data.

items.title: HS Code Search Engine
items.description: The official tariff search page used to research product HS/GTIP codes.

items.title: Easy Export Platform
items.description: An official platform bringing together market research, target country, training, and export planning tools.

items.title: TurkStat Data Portal
items.description: The official data portal for foreign trade statistics, dashboards, and open datasets.

careers.title: An open application area for those who want to join the team that drives operations forward
careers.description: We are looking for strong teammates in customs operations, customer management, transport planning, and field coordination. You can send us your resume and a short note by email through the form below.

form.title: Send your application by email
form.description: Your information is transferred to your default mail app. You can attach your CV file on the opened email screen.

about.title: We are an operations team that plans customs and logistics processes together
about.description: We aim to build a more structured process tailored to our clients’ import, export, transportation, and storage needs. We value communication and coordination as much as technical expertise.

slides.title: We clarify operational and regulatory needs before starting the process
slides.description: We evaluate documentation, transportation, and timing together to reduce unnecessary uncertainty.

slides.title: We see communication and coordination as an integral part of the process
slides.description: We adopt regular feedback and clear responsibility distribution to ensure clients stay in control of the process.

mission.title: Making processes clearer, easier to track, and more reliable
mission.description: We know that the same solution does not apply to every shipment. That is why our goal is to plan according to each need and keep operations away from unnecessary complexity.

slides.title: We want to break complex operations into clearer decision steps
slides.description: As the process grows, we aim to manage operations with a more readable structure so communication does not weaken.

slides.title: We want to build a process where the client knows what is happening and what to expect
slides.description: Our priority is to create a service language that reduces uncertainty and maintains clear, consistent communication.

partners.title: We build more balanced operations with partnerships that strengthen the process

showcase.title: Brands and business partners supporting the operational flow
showcase.description: This area is designed as a logo wall that presents global and regional players that can collaborate across different transportation and logistics lines.

aboutPage.title: Clear answers to who we are, what we aim for, and who we work with

slides.title: We are a team providing planning and coordination support in customs and logistics processes
slides.description: We aim to build a more readable process by combining technical operations with strong communication and tracking discipline.

slides.title: We aim to make complex processes simpler and more reliable
slides.description: Instead of using the same template for every shipment, we focus on tailored guidance and controlled operational flows.

slides.title: We build a structure that strengthens transport and field operations through partnerships
slides.description: We support the process with partners we collaborate with in storage, transportation, and foreign trade connections.

sections.title: Who We Are

sections.title: Our Purpose
sections.description: We aim to make complex processes simpler, more trackable, and more reliable.

discovery.title: We built a more meaningful framework that reflects our service approach

items.title: Right guidance
items.description: Instead of using the same template for every shipment, the operation model is shaped according to the need.

items.title: Clear communication
items.description: It makes communication between parties more readable and organized across different stages of the process.

items.title: Document and process discipline
items.description: It creates a stronger operational foundation in documentation, regulations, and planning.

items.title: Flexible operational support
items.description: It adapts to different scenarios based on transportation, storage, and customs needs.

hero.title: Get the right planning and reliable operational support for your foreign trade processes.
hero.description: We plan the right operational model together for your import, export, storage, and international transportation processes. Our goal is to make the process more structured, more trackable, and more reliable without making it unnecessarily complex.

card.title: Not the same for every shipment, but an operational approach shaped by need
card.focusValue: Right documents, right timing, right guidance
card.approachValue: Need-based, simple, and controlled operational structure

serviceCarousel.title: We present service categories shaped by need in a simple structure.
serviceCarousel.description: The goal here is not to describe a technically nonexistent system, but to show more clearly and more neatly where you provide support.

slides.title: We support document, declaration, and regulatory follow-up in import and export processes
slides.description: We handle the required document flow, declaration preparation, and operational coordination in a more organized structure.

slides.title: Planned shipment support in domestic and international road freight operations
slides.description: For partial or full-load needs, we provide planning and process coordination aligned with shipment rhythm.

slides.title: More balanced cost and transit planning in container-based transportation
slides.description: We create a more controlled operational flow in line selection, port processes, and document flow.

slides.title: Fast and organized air freight coordination for time-sensitive shipments
slides.description: For urgent shipments, we turn capacity, documentation, and operational coordination into a cleaner process.

approach.title: We explain our way of working through simple steps

teamHighlight.title: A team structure that treats the process not only as transportation, but as responsibility
teamHighlight.description: For clients, what creates trust is sometimes not just the service list, but how you follow the process and how you communicate. This section exists to express that trust more clearly.
